center.name: Yercaud
center.summary: Yercaud是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝头矶鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Male Blue-capped rock thrush|Blue-capped Rock Thrush perched on [[Sterculia urens, Yercaud, Tamil Nadu, India]] thumb|Blue Capped Rock Thrush in Nepal. The blue-capped rock thrush breeds in dense forests in the Himalayas and winters in the lowlands of southern India
